3039280.name: Contact
3039280.description:
On an abandoned countryside in rural America. Among cryptic notes left by your late grandfather. Ghostly shadows and lights in the dark, overshadows the lights of the heart.

Contact is an exploration and puzzle based psychological horror experience. It's a game about immersion, problem solving, exploring a farm that is abandoned... and yet alive. You battle your way through dense foliage as things rustle about.

...was that you or is something coming closer?

Using physics based puzzles and environments, cutting edge dynamic lighting, player responsive AI and a modular soundtrack, this game will try to immerse you completely.

NOTE: The game is focused on exploration and puzzle solving to progress through its story. Building up the tension slowly and relying on the players attention to details. The game also requires the player to interact with the environment under pressure which requires the player to notice smaller differences under stress.. This can be a hard game, in unconventional ways.

FEATURES

  • Player responsive AI that; searches, investigates and hunts

  • Physics based interaction system.

  • Immersive Realism.

  • Modular music
3039280.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
